calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge John Stewart, Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Richard Grabstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff 333 Fremont Venture, LLC.,
Witness Sommer Darin appearing for Plaintiff,
Defendants Josef Adler and Elizabeth Jayne Rosen appearing on their own behalf.
Parties and witnesses sworn and examined.

Parties reached an agreement and stated the terms of the settlement for the record.
Trial Date of December 5, 2016 at 9:00AM has been vacated.

Plaintiff to file a Notice of Conditional Settlement.
Plaintiff waives all other claims known and unknown.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Off Calendar
